identity.name: Radiofrecuencia Articular
identity.mission: Restore mobility without aggressive surgery through precision medicine.

layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned text for readability, asymmetric visual balance

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:translate-y-[-2px]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100/50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 hover:border-teal-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all group
cards.testimonial: bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 italic font-serif text-slate-700

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-teal-500/20 rounded-xl h-12

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts for all headings to establish a modern, clinical, yet friendly tone.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum legibility.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the Services section to break monotony.
The Hero section should feature the 'Active Senior' image to sell the outcome (mobility), not the process (surgery).
The 'About Doctor' section MUST use the user-provided 'Quirofano' (Operating Room) photo to establish extreme authority.
Use the Teal color (#0D9488) sparingly as an accent (buttons, icons, highlights), NOT as a primary background.
Ensure the 'WhatsApp' button is floating fixed at the bottom right with a z-index of 50.
The Contact Form must include the Privacy Policy checkbox as per legal requirements.
Use framer-motion for subtle entrance animations (fade-up) on scroll.
Integrate the Google Calendar link as a primary CTA in the Hero and Contact sections.
Mobile Responsiveness is paramount; ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts; use asymmetry and whitespace.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add a premium feel.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
